* useConversationPolling\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * Real-time message hook.  Tries SSE first (EventSource on the\\\\\\\\n * /messages/stream endpoint); falls back to optimised polling if\\\\\\\\n * SSE is unavailable.\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\\\\\\\\nimport { API_URL, httpClient } from '../providers/dataProvider';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst POLL_INTERVAL = 5000; // 5 s\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * @param {string|null} conversationId\\\\\\\\n * @returns {{ messages: Array, connectionStatus: string, appendMessage: Function, clearMessages: Function }}\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function useConversationPolling(conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]);\\\\\\\\n  const [connectionStatus, setConnectionStatus] = useState('idle');\\\\\\\\n  const lastFetchRef = useRef(null);\\\\\\\\n  const timerRef = useRef(null);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const appendMessage = useCallback((msg) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    setMessages((prev) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (prev.some((m) =&gt; m.id === msg.id)) return prev;\\\\\\\\n      return [...prev, msg];\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  const clearMessages = useCallback(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    setMessages([]);\\\\\\\\n    lastFetchRef.current = null;\\\\\\\\n  }, []);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n      setConnectionStatus('idle');\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let cancelled = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // --- SSE attempt --------------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n    const token = localStorage.getItem('auth_token');\\\\\\\\n    const sseUrl = &#96;${API_URL}/conversations/${conversationId}/messages/stream&#96;;\\\\\\\\n    let eventSource = null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      eventSource = new EventSource(sseUrl, { withCredentials: true });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      eventSource.addEventListener('connected', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (!cancelled) setConnectionStatus('connected');\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      eventSource.addEventListener('message', (e) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const payload = JSON.parse(e.data);\\\\\\\\n          const msg = payload.message ?? payload;\\\\\\\\n          appendMessage(msg);\\\\\\\\n        } catch { /* ignore malformed */ }\\\\\\\\n      });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      eventSource.onerror = () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n        // SSE failed – close and switch to polling\\\\\\\\n        eventSource?.close();\\\\\\\\n        eventSource = null;\\\\\\\\n        startPolling();\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n    } catch {\\\\\\\\n      // EventSource constructor may throw in some environments\\\\\\\\n      startPolling();\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // --- Polling fallback ----------------------------------------------------\\\\\\\\n    function startPolling() {\\\\\\\\n      if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n      setConnectionStatus('polling');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const poll = async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n        if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n        try {\\\\\\\\n          const params = lastFetchRef.current\\\\\\\\n            ? &#96;?since=${encodeURIComponent(lastFetchRef.current)}&#96;\\\\\\\\n            : '';\\\\\\\\n          const { json } = await httpClient(\\\\\\\\n            &#96;${API_URL}/conversations/${conversationId}/messages${params}&#96;\\\\\\\\n          );\\\\\\\\n          const incoming = json.data ?? json;\\\\\\\\n          if (Array.isArray(incoming) &amp;&amp; incoming.length &gt; 0) {\\\\\\\\n            setMessages((prev) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n              const ids = new Set(prev.map((m) =&gt; m.id));\\\\\\\\n              const fresh = incoming.filter((m) =&gt; !ids.has(m.id));\\\\\\\\n              return fresh.length &gt; 0 ? [...prev, ...fresh] : prev;\\\\\\\\n            });\\\\\\\\n            const newest = incoming[incoming.length - 1];\\\\\\\\n            lastFetchRef.current = newest.created_at ?? new Date().toISOString();\\\\\\\\n          }\\\\\\\\n        } catch {\\\\\\\\n          // Silently ignore polling errors\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      poll();\\\\\\\\n      timerRef.current = setInterval(poll, POLL_INTERVAL);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Cleanup\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      cancelled = true;\\\\\\\\n      if (eventSource) {\\\\\\\\n        eventSource.close();\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n      if (timerRef.current) {\\\\\\\\n        clearInterval(timerRef.current);\\\\\\\\n        timerRef.current = null;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }, [conversationId, appendMessage]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return { messages, connectionStatus, appendMessage, clearMessages };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n/**\\\\\\\\n * useTypingIndicator – polls typing users for a conversation.\\\\\\\\n *\\\\\\\\n * @param {string|null} conversationId\\\\\\\\n * @param {number} interval – poll interval in ms (default 2000)\\\\\\\\n * @returns {Array&lt;{userId: string, name: string}&gt;}\\\\\\\\n */\\\\\\\\nexport function useTypingIndicator(conversationId, interval = 2000) {\\\\\\\\n  const [typingUsers, setTypingUsers] = useState([]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  useEffect(() =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    if (!conversationId) {\\\\\\\\n      setTypingUsers([]);\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    let cancelled = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const poll = async () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      if (cancelled) return;\\\\\\\\n      try {\\\\\\\\n        const { json } = await httpClient(\\\\\\\\n          &#96;${API_URL}/conversations/${conversationId}/typing&#96;\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n        if (!cancelled) setTypingUsers(Array.isArray(json) ? json : []);\\\\\\\\n      } catch {\\\\\\\\n        if (!cancelled) setTypingUsers([]);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    poll();\\\\\\\\n    const timer = setInterval(poll, interval);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      cancelled = true;\\\\\\\\n      clearInterval(timer);\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n  }, [conversationId, interval]);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return typingUsers;\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nexport default function createRateLimiter(options: Partial&lt;RateLimitConfig&gt; = {}) {\\\\\\\\nconst \\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  } = options;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  return async function rateLimitMiddleware(\\\\\\\\n    request: FastifyRequest,\\\\\\\\n    reply: FastifyReply\\\\\\\\n  ): Promise&lt;void&gt; {\\\\\\\\n    // Skip rate limiting if configured\\\\\\\\n    if (skip &amp;&amp; skip(request)) {\\\\\\\\n      return;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    const redis = getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    const identifier = keyGenerator(request);\\\\\\\\n    const key = buildKey(keyPrefix, identifier);\\\\\\\\n    const now = Date.now();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      // Execute Lua script for atomic rate limiting\\\\\\\\n      const result = await redis.eval(\\\\\\\\n        LUA_SLIDING_WINDOW,\\\\\\\\n        1,\\\\\\\\n        key,\\\\\\\\n        now.toString(),\\\\\\\\n        timeWindow.toString(),\\\\\\\\n        max.toString()\\\\\\\\n      ) as [number, number];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      const [count, retryAfter] = result;\\\\\\\\n      const remaining = Math.max(0, max - count);\\\\\\\\n      const resetTime = Math.ceil((now + timeWindow) / 1000);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Set rate limit headers\\\\\\\\n      reply.header('X-RateLimit-Limit', max.toString());\\\\\\\\n      reply.header('X-RateLimit-Remaining', remaining.toString());\\\\\\\\n      reply.header('X-RateLimit-Reset', resetTime.toString());\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Check if rate limited\\\\\\\\n      if (count &gt; max) {\\\\\\\\n        reply.header('Retry-After', retryAfter.toString());\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        request.log.warn({\\\\\\\\n          identifier,\\\\\\\\n          count,\\\\\\\\n          max,\\\\\\\\n          retryAfter\\\\\\\\n        }, 'Rate limit exceeded');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        throw new RateLimitError(retryAfter);\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      request.log.debug({\\\\\\\\n        identifier,\\\\\\\\n        remaining,\\\\\\\\n        max\\\\\\\\n      }, 'Rate limit check passed');\\\\\\\\n    } catch (error) {\\\\\\\\n      // Re-throw rate limit errors\\\\\\\\n      if (error instanceof RateLimitError) {\\\\\\\\n        throw error;\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Log Redis errors but don't block the request\\\\\\\\n      request.log.error({\\\\\\\\n        err: error,\\\\\\\\n        identifier\\\\\\\\n      }, 'Rate limit check failed, allowing request');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // In case of Redis failure, allow the request through\\\\\\\\n      // This prevents rate limiting from blocking all traffic if Redis is down\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  };\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// Как теперь разрабатывать проект?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nТвой рабочий процесс почти не изменится, он просто станет более упорядоченным.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n* **Написание кода:** Ты по-прежнему пишешь функции и компоненты в Cursor.\\\\\\\\n* **Тестирование:** Ты запускаешь проект локально через Docker, чтобы убедиться, что всё работает.\\\\\\\\n* **Изменение базы данных:** Ты используешь миграции (например, &#96;npm run migrate:up&#96;). Когда ты запустишь деплой, скрипт сам применит эти миграции на удаленной базе данных.\\\\\\\\n* **Обновление на сервере:** Как только фича готова, ты запускаешь &#96;bash deploy/aws/deploy-aws.sh&#96;, и через пару минут изменения видны на сайте.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4. Можно ли добавить Redis?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Хорошая новость: Redis уже в плане!**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nВ ходе обсуждения мы выяснили, что твоя CRM использует библиотеку **BullMQ** для очередей задач (рассылка писем, уведомления), а она не работает без Redis. Поэтому:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n* Мы оставили Redis как отдельный контейнер в твоем Docker-стеке.\\\\\\\\n* Он работает на **App-сервере** и помогает обрабатывать фоновые задачи.\\\\\\\\n* Ты можешь использовать его для любых новых функций (например, кэширования), просто обращаясь к нему по адресу &#96;redis://redis:6379&#96;.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Твой следующий конкретный шаг:\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"3. **Скрипт &#96;deploy-aws.sh&#96;:** Это твоя кнопка «Сделать всё». =============================================================================\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nconst poolConfig: pg.PoolConfig = {\\\\\\\\n  connectionString: config.databaseUrl,\\\\\\\\n  max: 20,                    // Maximum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  min: 2,                     // Minimum connections in pool\\\\\\\\n  idleTimeoutMillis: 30000,   // Close idle connections after 30s\\\\\\\\n  connectionTimeoutMillis: 5000, // Connection timeout\\\\\\\\n  allowExitOnIdle: false\\\\\\\\n};\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n// (!pool) {\\\\\\\\n    pool = new Pool(poolConfig);\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('connect', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.log('✅ PostgreSQL client connected');\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('error', (err) =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n      console.error('❌ PostgreSQL pool error:', err.message);\\\\\\\\n    });\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    pool.on('remove', () =&gt; {\\\\\\\\n fastify.log.info('Connecting to database...');\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      const dbHealthy = await db.healthCheck();\\\\\\\\n      if (!dbHealthy) {\\\\\\\\n        throw new Error('Database health check returned false');\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n    } catch (dbError) {\\\\\\\\n      const err = dbError as Error;\\\\\\\\n      fastify.log.error({ err, message: err.message }, 'Database connection error');\\\\\\\\n      throw new Error(&#96;Failed to connect to database: ${err.message}&#96;);\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('✅ Database connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize Redis connection\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Connecting to Redis...');\\\\\\\\n    getRedisConnection();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('✅ Redis connected');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize BullMQ queues\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('Initializing queues...');\\\\\\\\n    initializeQueues();\\\\\\\\n    fastify.log.info('✅ Queues initialized');\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Start 🧬 DNA Marketing Engine\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nA custom CRM platform with Smart Routing &amp; Intent Detection for the biotech industry.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Event Ingestion**: Receive marketing events from multiple channels (Waalaxy, Lemlist, Website, Ads, Conferences)\\\\\\\\n- **Lead Scoring**: Real-time scoring with configurable rules and decay mechanism\\\\\\\\n- **Intent Detection**: Automatic detection of product intent (Research Lab, B2B Lab, Co-Creation)\\\\\\\\n- **Smart Routing**: Intelligent routing to the correct pipeline based on score + intent\\\\\\\\n- **Automation Engine**: Automated stage movements, notifications, and task creation\\\\\\\\n- **Integrations**: Moco (German finance) and Slack (alerts &amp; notifications)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Component | Technology |\\\\\\\\n|-----------|------------|\\\\\\\\n| Runtime | Node.js 20+ |\\\\\\\\n| Framework | Fastify |\\\\\\\\n| Database | PostgreSQL 15+ |\\\\\\\\n| Queue | Redis + BullMQ |\\\\\\\\n| Language | TypeScript (strict) |\\\\\\\\n| Validation | Zod |\\\\\\\\n| Migrations | node-pg-migrate |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Node.js 20+\\\\\\\\n- Docker and Docker Compose\\\\\\\\n- npm v9+\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Quick Start\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1. Clone and Install\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ngit clone &lt;repository-url&gt;\\\\\\\\ncd dna-marketing-engine\\\\\\\\nnpm install\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2. Environment Setup\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Copy example environment file\\\\\\\\ncp env.example .env\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Edit .env with your configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3. Start Infrastructure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Start PostgreSQL and Redis\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose up -d\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Wait for services to be healthy\\\\\\\\ndocker-compose ps\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4. Run Migrations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Apply database migrations\\\\\\\\nnpm run migrate:up\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Or manually:\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200000_initial-schema.sql\\\\\\\\ndocker exec -i dna_postgres psql -U dna -d dna_marketing &lt; migrations/1737475200001_seed-pipelines.sql\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5. DNA ME CRM — Final AWS Deployment Plan\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nMerged from Plans b0ab4d72 and b742a208 with expert review upgrades.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Summary\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| Aspect | Implementation |\\\\\\\\n|--------|----------------|\\\\\\\\n| **EC2** | 2× t3.medium (App + DB) |\\\\\\\\n| **Region** | eu-central-1 |\\\\\\\\n| **VPC** | 10.0.0.0/16, public subnet only (no NAT) |\\\\\\\\n| **DB** | Public subnet, Public IP, SG-restricted (5432 from App, 22 from AllowedCidr) |\\\\\\\\n| **EBS** | DB volume DeleteOnTermination: false |\\\\\\\\n| **Backup** | Cron 3 AM, local + S3 (IAM role) |\\\\\\\\n| **AllowedCidr** | Default 1.1.1.1/32 (change to your IP) |\\\\\\\\n| **Docker Compose** | Pinned v2.29.1 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Architecture\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nInternet → Elastic IP → App EC2 (t3.medium)\\\\\\\\n                         ├── Nginx (80/443) + Certbot\\\\\\\\n                         ├── API (:3000)\\\\\\\\n                         ├── Workers\\\\\\\\n                         ├── Frontend (Nginx SPA)\\\\\\\\n                         └── Redis (:6379)\\\\\\\\n                              │ DATABASE_URL=postgres://...@&lt;DB_IP&gt;:5432/...\\\\\\\\n                              ▼\\\\\\\\n                         DB EC2 (t3.medium, private subnet)\\\\\\\\n                         └── Postgres (:5432) in Docker\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Deploy Sequence (deploy-aws.sh)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Fetch AppPublicIP and DbPrivateIP from CloudFormation\\\\\\\\n2. Deploy to DB instance first (direct SSH via DbPublicIP or ProxyJump)\\\\\\\\n3. Wait 45s for Postgres to become healthy\\\\\\\\n4. Deploy to App instance (migrate, then docker compose)\\\\\\\\n5. Health check\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Files Created\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| File | Purpose |\\\\\\\\n|------|---------|\\\\\\\\n| &#96;cloudformation.yaml&#96; | VPC, Subnet, IGW, SG, EC2, EIP, User Data |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;docker-compose.aws.yml&#96; | All services, Certbot SSL |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf&#96; | Reverse proxy (HTTP→HTTPS, Frontend, API) |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;nginx-aws.conf.template&#96; | Domain placeholder for custom domains |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;Dockerfile.nginx-certbot&#96; | Nginx + Certbot image |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;entrypoint-nginx-certbot.sh&#96; | SSL init + renewal loop |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;init-letsencrypt.sh&#96; | Dummy certs helper |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;backup.sh&#96; | pg_dump cron script |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;user-data.sh&#96; | EC2 bootstrap (standalone reference) |\\\\\\\\n|
